question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asks zero didactic questions. It delivers a complete solution with explanation in turn 1, then in turn 2 just rebuts the user's framing. No teachable moments are turned into questions for the user.

question_quality.rationale: No questions are posed at all, so no crux is targeted. The Pair did surface an A/B comparison table in turn 2, but presented it as a verdict rather than a choice for the learner.

scaffolding.rationale: Turn 1 dumps intuition, recurrence, code, trace, complexity, and takeaways all at once — no progression or gradient. The user sees the full answer immediately with no incremental build-up.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the turn-2 correction (rejecting the spurious 'ai-pair-proto project' framing) is appropriately skeptical and clear. But the conversation is essentially a monologue with no real back-and-forth, and turn 2 is dominated by meta-commentary about the user's confused message.

effectiveness.rationale: Final code is correct and equivalent to baseline — same O(n)/O(1) iterative DP plus the memoized variant for comparison. No functional advantage or regression vs. baseline.

friction.rationale: Roughly 2x baseline (66s, 2 turns vs 34s, 1 turn) with no proportional pedagogical payoff — the extra turn was spent correcting a hallucinated project reference rather than teaching. Output is also more verbose without adding substantive insight beyond the baseline.
